creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to kientzle from comment #3)

For the first part... if we picked up the feature fixes, why are the tests failing? Shouldn't it be marked as skipped/an expected failure until the code under test has been fixed?

...

About the second part -- ugh. That doesn't jive well with kyua. Is there any way to force it to clean up after itself (considering that by default kyua blows everything away in $TMPDIR ;(...)?
